body:
closes https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCalibrate.jl/issues/290

This PR refactors the existing code into three different modules `EKPUtils`, `BackendManager`, and `Calibration`.

The purpose of `EKPUtils` is to contain utility functions for EKP that doesn't depend on using the rest of the functionality of `ClimaCalibrate`.

For `HPCBackend`, the original `calibrate` function contains functionality to submit slurm jobs, wait for the slurm jobs to complete, and update the G ensemble and EKP object. The `BackendManager` module contain only the functionality to submit slurm scripts and the `Calibration` module uses the API provided by the `BackendManager` module to submit the slurm jobs for calibration. In the future, this should make it easier to implement other features such as a way to perform a parameter sweep. 

Similarly, for the `JuliaBackend` and `WorkerBackend`, the same changes are made to the `calibrate` function to keep the structure of these functions mostly the same. Although, minimal changes were made to these functions compared to the functions that dispatch on the `HPCBackend`.
title: Refactor code into different modules
